claims.text: GPT-5.6 has three tiers: Sol (flagship, $5/$30 per MTok), Terra (balanced, $2.50/$15), Luna (fast, $1/$6)
OpenAI deferred a full public rollout at the explicit request of the US government, limiting initial access to ~20 partners
Executive Order 14409 signed June 2, 2026 codifying a 30-day pre-release window
GPT-5.6 Sol achieves SOTA on Terminal-Bench 2.1
GPT-5.6 Sol improves over GPT-5.5 on GeneBench v1 and HealthBench Professional
GPT-5.6 Sol did not reach the Cyber Critical threshold under OpenAI's Preparedness Framework
GPT-5.6 deploys a layered safety stack with real-time classifiers

Fable 5 and Mythos 5 globally suspended June 12, 2026 at 5:21pm ET
